closed_gaps: cvt.s64.s32 with F64 source -> cvt.s64.s32 with U32 source
mov.f64 %fd<n>, %fd0 (undefined symbol) -> mov.u64 %rd<n>, %rd0 (KERNEL array-param U64 fallback)

numeric_fail_diagnosis.root_cause: kernel body has no STMT_LOAD/STMT_STORE wiring + param-value-load not emitted
numeric_fail_diagnosis.evidence: c[0..N) retains the pre-launch sentinel because the kernel never executes ld.global.f64 + st.global.f64 to materialize the vec-add
remaining_gaps: ld.param.u64 %rd<i>, [<name>_param_<i>] at function entry (param Locals are stamped U64 but never loaded)
STMT_LOAD lowering: source `a[to_i64(gid)]` not emitting ld.global.f64
STMT_STORE lowering: source `c[i] = ...` not emitting st.global.f64
